heading: Biodiesel
label: 17031 Biodiesel
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the date that is 1 day after , see , set out as a note under , The Congress.Dec. 19, 2007section 1601 of Pub. L. 110–140section 1824 of Title 2

children.heading: Biodiesel study
children.label: a Biodiesel study
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the Secretary, in consultation with the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency, shall submit to Congress a report on any research and development challenges inherent in increasing the proportion of diesel fuel sold in the United States that is biodiesel.December 19, 2007

children.heading: Material for the establishment of standards
children.label: b Material for the establishment of standards
children.text: The Director of the National Institute of Standards and Technology, in consultation with the Secretary, shall make publicly available the physical property data and characterization of biodiesel and other biofuels as appropriate.
